with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

type(quran), len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10]
quran[0]

import re, unicodedata, math, itertools, difflib, statistics

AR_DIACRITICS = ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x0610, 0x061A+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x064B, 0x065F+1)) + ''.join(chr(c) for c in range(0x06D6, 0x06ED+1))
TATWEEL = '\u0640'
PUNCT = ''.join(ch for ch in map(chr, range(0x20, 0x7f)) if not ch.isalnum()) + '«»“”–—…'
PUNCT_AR = '؟؛،ـ'
def strip_diacritics(s):
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if ch not in AR_DIACRITICS)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = re.sub(r'[{}]'.format(re.escape(PUNCT+PUNCT_AR)), ' ', s)
    # unify alifs
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱا]', 'ا', s)
    # hamza forms to bare hamza? We'll remove hamza seats maybe map ؤئء to ء or ignore; but keep letters
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # ya/alif maqsura
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # heh
    # tah marbuta
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # numbers english and arabic
    s = re.sub(r'[0-9٠-٩]', ' ', s)
    s = s.lower()
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def ratio(a,b):
    return difflib.SequenceMatcher(a=a,b=b).ratio()

def lcs_len(a,b):
    # implement dynamic programming LCS length
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1] == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def normalized_lcs_ratio(a,b):
    # compute LCS over normalized strings (remove spaces as well)
    an = normalize_arabic(a).replace(' ','')
    bn = normalize_arabic(b).replace(' ','')
    if not an or not bn:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_len(an,bn)
    # normalized length: average of lengths? We'll use 2*lcs/(len(a)+len(b))
    return 2*lcs/(len(an)+len(bn))

snippet = "وَلَقَدْ م...َ الشُكْرِ"

norm_span_full

candidates = [("طه 37", "وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰ"),
              ("الصافات 114", "وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَارُونَ"),
              ("الحجرات 17", "يَمُنُّونَ عَلَيْكَ أَنْ أَسْلَمُوا ۖ قُلْ لَا تَمُنُّوا عَلَيَّ إِسْلَامَكُمْ ۖ بَلِ اللَّهُ يَمُنُّ عَلَيْكُمْ أَنْ هَدَاكُمْ لِلْإِيمَانِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ صَادِقِينَ"),
              ("النساء 94", "يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا ضَرَبْتُمْ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَتَبَيَّنُوا وَلَا تَقُولُوا لِمَنْ أَلْقَىٰ إِلَيْكُمُ السَّلَامَ لَسْتَ مُؤْمِنًا تَبْتَغُونَ عَرَضَ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا فَعِنْدَ اللَّهِ مَغَانِمُ كَثِيرَةٌ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ كُنْتُمْ مِنْ قَبْلُ فَمَنَّ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمْ فَتَبَيَّنُوا ۚ إِنَّ اللَّهَ كَانَ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرًا")]
ratios = [(name, normalized_lcs_ratio(span_full, text)) for name, text in candidates]
ratios

# Let's build normalized text from hadith, using hadithTxt or Matn
def get_hadith_text(rec):
    # prefer 'hadithTxt' if present and non-empty; else 'Matn'
    txt = (rec.get('hadithTxt') or "").strip()
    if not txt:
        txt = (rec.get('Matn') or "").strip()
    return txt

hadith_norm_texts = [normalize_arabic(get_hadith_text(rec)) for rec in hadith]
# Search for token patterns
query_norm = normalize_arabic(span_full)
# Search for hadith containing "ولقد من عليكم ربكم"
results_hadith = []
for i, rec in enumerate(hadith):
    t = hadith_norm_texts[i]
    if "ولقد" in t and "من" in t and "عليكم" in t and "ربكم" in t:
        results_hadith.append((i, rec['title'] if 'title' in rec else "", get_hadith_text(rec)))
len(results_hadith)
